area-alt.description: Ensure <area> elements of image maps have alternative text

aria-allowed-attr.description: Ensure an element's role supports its ARIA attributes

aria-braille-equivalent.description:
Ensure aria-braillelabel and aria-brailleroledescription have a
          non-braille equivalent

aria-command-name.description: Ensure every ARIA button, link and menuitem has an accessible name

aria-conditional-attr.description:
Ensure ARIA attributes are used as described in the specification of
          the element's role

aria-deprecated-role.description: Ensure elements do not use deprecated roles

aria-hidden-body.description:
Ensure aria-hidden="true" is not present on the document
          body.

aria-hidden-focus.description:
Ensure aria-hidden elements are not focusable nor contain focusable
          elements

aria-input-field-name.description: Ensure every ARIA input field has an accessible name

aria-meter-name.description: Ensure every ARIA meter node has an accessible name

aria-progressbar-name.description: Ensure every ARIA progressbar node has an accessible name

aria-prohibited-attr.description: Ensure ARIA attributes are not prohibited for an element's role

aria-required-attr.description: Ensure elements with ARIA roles have all required ARIA attributes

aria-required-children.description:
Ensure elements with an ARIA role that require child roles contain
          them

aria-required-parent.description:
Ensure elements with an ARIA role that require parent roles are
          contained by them

aria-roles.description: Ensure all elements with a role attribute use a valid value

aria-toggle-field-name.description: Ensure every ARIA toggle field has an accessible name

aria-tooltip-name.description: Ensure every ARIA tooltip node has an accessible name

aria-valid-attr-value.description: Ensure all ARIA attributes have valid values

aria-valid-attr.description: Ensure attributes that begin with aria- are valid ARIA attributes

bypass.description:
Ensure each page has at least one mechanism for a user to bypass
          navigation and jump straight to the content

color-contrast.description:
Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets
          WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds

dlitem.description:
Ensure <dt> and <dd> elements are contained by a
          <dl>

document-title.description: Ensure each HTML document contains a non-empty <title> element

duplicate-id-aria.description: Ensure every id attribute value used in ARIA and in labels is unique

form-field-multiple-labels.description: Ensure form field does not have multiple label elements

frame-focusable-content.description:
Ensure <frame> and <iframe> elements with focusable
          content do not have tabindex=-1

frame-title-unique.description:
Ensure <iframe> and <frame> elements contain a unique
          title attribute

frame-title.description:
Ensure <iframe> and <frame> elements have an accessible
          name

html-has-lang.description: Ensure every HTML document has a lang attribute

html-lang-valid.description:
Ensure the lang attribute of the <html> element has a valid
          value

html-xml-lang-mismatch.description:
Ensure that HTML elements with both valid lang and xml:lang attributes
          agree on the base language of the page

image-alt.description: Ensure elements have alternative text or a role of none or presentation

input-button-name.description: Ensure input buttons have discernible text

input-image-alt.description:
Ensure <input type="image"> elements have alternative
          text

label.description: Ensure every form element has a label

link-in-text-block.description:
Ensure links are distinguished from surrounding text in a way that
          does not rely on color

list.description: Ensure that lists are structured correctly

meta-refresh.description:
Ensure <meta http-equiv="refresh"> is not used for
          delayed refresh

meta-viewport.description:
Ensure <meta name="viewport"> does not disable text
          scaling and zooming

nested-interactive.description:
Ensure interactive controls are not nested as they are not always
          announced by screen readers or can cause focus problems for assistive
          technologies

no-autoplay-audio.description:
Ensure <video> or <audio> elements do not autoplay audio
          for more than 3 seconds without a control mechanism to stop or mute
          the audio

scrollable-region-focusable.description:
Ensure elements that have scrollable content are accessible by
          keyboard

select-name.description: Ensure select element has an accessible name

server-side-image-map.description: Ensure that server-side image maps are not used

summary-name.description: Ensure summary elements have discernible text

svg-img-alt.description:
Ensure <svg> elements with an img, graphics-document or
          graphics-symbol role have accessible text

td-headers-attr.description:
Ensure that each cell in a table that uses the headers attribute
          refers only to other <th> elements in that table

th-has-data-cells.description:
Ensure that <th> elements and elements with
          role=columnheader/rowheader have data cells they describe

valid-lang.description: Ensure lang attributes have valid values

autocomplete-valid.description:
Ensure the autocomplete attribute is correct and suitable for the form
          field

avoid-inline-spacing.description:
Ensure that text spacing set through style attributes can be adjusted
          with custom stylesheets

target-size.description: Ensure touch targets have sufficient size and space

accesskeys.description: Ensure every accesskey attribute value is unique

aria-allowed-role.description: Ensure role attribute has an appropriate value for the element

aria-dialog-name.description: Ensure every ARIA dialog and alertdialog node has an accessible name

aria-text.description:
Ensure role="text" is used on elements with no focusable
          descendants

aria-treeitem-name.description: Ensure every ARIA treeitem node has an accessible name

empty-table-header.description: Ensure table headers have discernible text

frame-tested.description:
Ensure <iframe> and <frame> elements contain the axe-core
          script

heading-order.description: Ensure the order of headings is semantically correct

image-redundant-alt.description: Ensure image alternative is not repeated as text

label-title-only.description:
Ensure that every form element has a visible label and is not solely
          labeled using hidden labels, or the title or aria-describedby
          attributes

landmark-banner-is-top-level.description: Ensure the banner landmark is at top level

landmark-complementary-is-top-level.description: Ensure the complementary landmark or aside is at top level

landmark-contentinfo-is-top-level.description: Ensure the contentinfo landmark is at top level

landmark-main-is-top-level.description: Ensure the main landmark is at top level

landmark-no-duplicate-banner.description: Ensure the document has at most one banner landmark

landmark-no-duplicate-contentinfo.description: Ensure the document has at most one contentinfo landmark

landmark-no-duplicate-main.description: Ensure the document has at most one main landmark

landmark-one-main.description: Ensure the document has a main landmark

meta-viewport-large.description:
Ensure <meta name="viewport"> can scale a significant
          amount

page-has-heading-one.description:
Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a
          level-one heading

presentation-role-conflict.description:
Ensure elements marked as presentational do not have global ARIA or
          tabindex so that all screen readers ignore them

region.description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks

scope-attr-valid.description: Ensure the scope attribute is used correctly on tables

skip-link.description: Ensure all skip links have a focusable target

tabindex.description: Ensure tabindex attribute values are not greater than 0

table-duplicate-name.description:
Ensure the <caption> element does not contain the same text as
          the summary attribute

color-contrast-enhanced.description:
Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets
          WCAG 2 AAA enhanced contrast ratio thresholds

identical-links-same-purpose.description:
Ensure that links with the same accessible name serve a similar
          purpose

meta-refresh-no-exceptions.description:
Ensure <meta http-equiv="refresh"> is not used for
          delayed refresh

css-orientation-lock.description:
Ensure content is not locked to any specific display orientation, and
          the content is operable in all display orientations

focus-order-semantics.description:
Ensure elements in the focus order have a role appropriate for
          interactive content

label-content-name-mismatch.description:
Ensure that elements labelled through their content must have their
          visible text as part of their accessible name

p-as-heading.description:
Ensure bold, italic text and font-size is not used to style

elements as a heading

table-fake-caption.description: Ensure that tables with a caption use the <caption> element.

td-has-header.description:
Ensure that each non-empty data cell in a <table> larger than 3
          by 3 has one or more table headers

aria-roledescription.description:
Ensure aria-roledescription is only used on elements with an implicit
          or explicit role

duplicate-id-active.description: Ensure every id attribute value of active elements is unique

duplicate-id.description: Ensure every id attribute value is unique
